text.title: embedded-scratchpad-field Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for embedded-scratchpad-field as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Reverse order — scratchpad must come BEFORE the answer to act as CoT

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Description should say "Step-by-step analysis of evidence" — concrete

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pick one (or one per phase); stacking confuses

failure-mode.description: Scratchpad that just echoes the input
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Description must demand actual analysis, not paraphrase

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Let it breathe; ~200-500 tokens for non-trivial reasoning
